[ SCORCH // AZURE YELLOW SWEATPANTS LOOSE ]

Upgrade your streetwear game with the SCORCH Azure Contrast Yellow Sweatpants. These loose-fit joggers are designed for the ultimate Y2K Sporty aesthetic, featuring a vibrant yellow base with bold azure blue graffiti accents. Engineered for a relaxed, baggy look that stays trendy in any game.

🔥 DETAILS:

Brand: Official SCORCH Signature.
Fit: Ultra Loose / Baggy Sweatpants Silhouette.
Design: Azure Blue graffiti "S" with playful character embroidery.
Style: Perfect for Y2K Sporty, Cybercore, and Urban Streetwear.

items.name: Baby Blue OraBella Signature Off-Shoulder Sweater
items.description:
Off-shoulder knit sweater featuring the iconic Ora’Bella signature pattern in a soft baby blue tone. Designed with a relaxed neckline that highlights the shoulders and long sleeves that naturally hide the hands, this piece blends cozy comfort with a refined geek-chic aesthetic. The all-over branded motif adds a subtle luxury feel while keeping the look playful and stylish.

🔗 Ora’Bella: https://www.roblox.com/communities/1072106749/OraBella#!/store

The Arcade Party Y2K Sweater features an oversized silhouette covered in playful glitch graphics, smiley icons, anime-inspired visuals, and retro game energy on a clean black base.

Built for bold fits, baggy styling, and full Y2K expression.
